title: Interaction Editor
description: This is a utility for editing Interaction Entities
body:
## ✅ Features
- Allows moving/editing interaction entities

## 📖 Usage
- Use `/trigger ie-new` to summon a new, or `/trigger ie-edit` to edit a nearby interaction entity
- Right-click in air to move the interaction in the opposite direction of where the player's looking
  - Hold your sprint key to invert the movement
- Right-click the interaction to edit its properties
- There is `/ie new` and `/ie edit` if you have [Declarative UI](https://modrinth.com/project/5UTWPtx3) installed.
